name: Cool and Creamy Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Mix graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter.
2. Press mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
Filling:
1. Dissolve gelatin in cold water over low heat until blended.
2. Beat softened cream cheese and sugar with an electric mixer until smooth.
3. Gradually add dissolved gelatin, milk, and lemon juice to the cream cheese mixture.
4. Stir in whipped cream until combined.
5. Pour filling over the crust.
6. Refrigerate until slightly thickened and firm.
(Optional: If desired, top with fruit just before serving.)
